title: /V3EmitCFunc.h:1457: Unknown node type reached emitter: CVTPACKEDTOARRAY

features.name: byte reversal of struct field assigned to unpacked array slice
features.description: Code should include a byte-reversal operation {<<8{struct_field}} applied to a struct field, where the result is assigned to an unpacked array slice (e.g., x[2:1])
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [15:0] f; } some_t; some_t s; logic [7:0][7:0] x; x[2:1] = {<<8{s.f}};

features.name: packed struct with byte field used in byte reversal
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing a 16-bit field used in byte-reversal operation within a function returning a 2D unpacked array
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [15:0] f; } some_t; function logic [7:0][7:0] foo(input some_t s); logic [7:0][7:0] x; x[2:1] = {<<8{s.f}};
